posts.author: JasHam (Jasmine Hammond)
posts.cookedHtml:
Event title: What can monday Service do for your nonprofit?

Description: We’ll be joined by an expert from the monday Service team who can highlight all the great new features available exclusively on this product. monday Service is our latest product, and offers tools and features to optimize service delivery, track requests, and enhance customer support workflows.
